---
title: "Reproducible Research"
id: gis-reproducible-research
order: 300
summary: "Reproducible research is rooted in good scientific practice and transparent, repeatable research work."
module-goals: []
materials:
  - material-gis-reproducible-research-intro
  - material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-4
  - material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-5
  - material-guide
  - material-gis-reproducible-research-expose
activities:
  - activity-gis-reproducible-research-blogs
  - activity-gis-reproducible-research-r
  - activity-gis-reproducible-research-blogdown
  - activity-gis-reproducible-research-external-1
  - activity-gis-reproducible-research-external-2
assessments: []
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/module-gis-reproducible-research.md"
title-block-banner: ../images/gis-reproducible-research/spatial-r-r.png
title-block-banner-color: black
listing:
  - id: module-module-goals
    contents: "../module-goals/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: gis-reproducible-research
      heading: "Goals"

  - id: module-materials
    contents: "../materials/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: gis-reproducible-research
      heading: "Materials"

  - id: module-activities
    contents: "../activities/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: gis-reproducible-research
      heading: "Activities"

  - id: module-assessments
    contents: "../assessments/*.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: "../_templates/module-cards.ejs.md"
    template-params:
      module_id: gis-reproducible-research
      heading: "Assessments"
---



::: {#module-module-goals}
:::

::: {#module-materials}
:::

::: {#module-activities}
:::

::: {#module-assessments}
:::
